title: Product Data Analyst
responsibilities: prepare datasets and business reports; build dashboards for product and operations teams; translate analytical findings into action items
requirements_text: We are looking for a middle specialist with hands-on experience in sql, python, excel, tableau, looker. Strong communication and delivery ownership are expected.
benefits: Flexible schedule, paid vacation, learning budget, mentorship, and access to modern tooling.
summary: DataBridge is hiring a middle product data analyst to support analyzing business metrics, building dashboards, and explaining trends.
raw_text: Vacancy V038: Product Data Analyst at DataBridge. Location: Kharkiv. Employment: hybrid. Required experience: 2.9 years. Required skills: sql, python, excel, tableau, looker, bigquery, a/b testing, power bi. Optional skills: forecasting, product analytics, ga4. Responsibilities: prepare datasets and business reports; build dashboards for product and operations teams; translate analytical findings into action items.
